summary: Iteration 7: Redesigned BlogListPage Testing - All features working correctly. Backend 16/16 tests passed. Frontend shows 17 total blog cards (5 CMS + 12 static), featured post section, category filters, search, 'Why Trust' section, and CTA buttons all functional.
seed_data_creation: 5 CMS blog posts in MongoDB, 12 static hardcoded posts in BlogListPage.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesigned /blog page fully working. 17 total articles (5 CMS + 12 static). CMS posts from MongoDB appear first, then static hardcoded posts. Categories: All, Dishwasher, Dryer, Error Codes, Expert Advice, Maintenance Tips, Oven, Refrigerator, Repair Costs, Safety, Washer. Featured section appears only when category='All' and no search term. data-testids: blog-search-input, blog-cat-all, blog-cat-{category}, blog-cta-book, blog-cta-call, blog-card-{slug}. Static blog posts route to individual hardcoded pages (/blog/refrigerator-not-cooling loads RefrigeratorNotCooling.js). CMS blog posts route to BlogPostPage.js which fetches from API.

frontend_ui_tests.Category filter buttons visible (11 cate: PASS - All Tips, Dishwasher, Dryer, Error Codes, Expert Advice, Maintenance Tips, Oven, Refrigerator, Repair Costs, Safety, Washer
frontend_ui_tests.'Why Trust Our Appliance Advice?' sectio: PASS - Certified Technicians, Practical Tips, Always Updated
frontend_ui_tests.data-testid attributes present: PASS - blog-search-input, blog-cat-all, blog-cta-book, blog-cta-call, blog-card-*
